name: Onion

pros.title: makes meals feel more balanced
pros.explanation: The category has real value beyond single-nutrient stats.

pros.title: helps add volume without much calorie cost
pros.explanation: That makes vegetables easier to use often.

pros.title: good volume for the calories
pros.explanation: That matters for satiety and general usefulness.

cons.title: energy density is very low
cons.explanation: Good for some use cases, but not enough on its own.

cons.title: taste and texture can limit compliance
cons.explanation: A strong paper profile still needs real-world repeatability.

cons.title: rarely carries a meal by itself
cons.explanation: That is normal here, but still part of the tradeoff.

sourceNotes: Expanded dataset sample for FoodRanked pressure-testing.
Values are approximate representative placeholders for category tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
